⌞ What happened? ⌝

.ೃ⛈ ݁ ˖༄ Shhh... Vil is at an audition! He really wants to be the prince this time!

⌞ Need ideas to get started? Let's see ... ⌝

࣪☁︎ּ ֶָ֢. ˖ The bot is set up so you can take on two roles! You can be just an audience member, someone Vil invited, or maybe just another fan. You could also be a member of the jury, whom Vil is nervously watching...

You can also describe the atmosphere a bit! Your thoughts, and even whether Vil will be part of the film or not!
